message:
chore(beads): pick up bd-n8blq + bd-x4l3t (open -> in_progress)

Routine status flip as agents picked up two task beads:

- bd-n8blq: "Conformance harness: build syscall-level conformance
  tests vs reference fs". Will apply the testing-conformance-harnesses
  skill, drive our fs through the same syscall sequences as Linux ext4
  on tmpfs, and emit a per-syscall differential diff (return value,
  errno, side effects) covering file lifecycle, directory ops,
  attribute ops, link semantics, mmap interaction, fsync, mount/umount.

- bd-x4l3t: "[FUSE] vendored fuser protocol upgrade: 7.31 -> 7.40 +
  FUSE_NOTIFY_* + FUSE_STATX". Prerequisite bead for bd-bx1wu (memfd
  seals), bd-4uyu5 (RWF_*/io_uring), bd-x0lv6 (inotify), bd-qpoys
  (splice/sendfile), and bd-ntb4l-followup (STATX_BTIME). Lifts
  vendor/fuser from abi-7-31 to abi-7-40 (libfuse 3.x baseline),
  surfaces FUSE_NOTIFY_INVAL_ENTRY/INVAL_INODE/DELETE for kernel
  dcache invalidation, FUSE_STATX (proto 7.35) for STATX_BTIME, and
  the io_uring / RWF_* flag bits for the OpenFs::ext4_write fast path.

No source changes; only the ledger updates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
